source.title: Orbitofrontal cortex as a cognitive map of task space

confidence_rationale: The single most architecturally consequential paper in this pull for the *local accumulator* role. The OFC-as-cognitive-map-of-task-space framing is essentially the V_s construct re-stated for OFC: OFC labels the current latent state, that label gates downstream reward learning, and changes to that label *are* changes to the schema. This makes OFC representational drift the strongest candidate substrate for MECH-284 the accumulator. The paper is theoretical-with-empirical-anchor (reversal learning, devaluation, OFC-VTA effects) but does not directly measure online-waking V_s downweight; the mapping is structural, not measured.
failure_signatures: OFC lesion produces inability to update inferred state when sensory observations are constant but underlying outcome contingencies have changed -- this is the canonical reversal-learning deficit. Architecturally this is the failure of the local accumulator: the broadcast trigger may still fire but the local schema label does not update, so V_s never effectively changes.

mapping.source_claim_statement: OFC provides an abstraction of currently available information in the form of a labeling of the current task state, used by reinforcement learning circuits elsewhere in the brain; especially critical when task states include unobservable information. Reversal learning, delayed alternation, extinction, and devaluation are all explained by OFC tracking the latent state.
mapping.ree_translation: OFC = the local schema label for the currently-anchored regional dynamics. V_s tracks how well the anchor's predictions match observed outcomes; OFC tracks the analogous latent state. The architectural mapping is OFC representational change *during waking* as the substrate for MECH-284's accumulator output: when OFC's labelling changes, V_s for the previously labelled schema effectively drops because downstream RL circuits stop using that label. MECH-269's anchor reset criterion fires when OFC labelling crosses a discrete boundary.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Wilson et al frame OFC as labelling for use by external RL, not as tracking schema validity per se. Whether the relabelling event in OFC is graded (proportional V_s downweight) or threshold-crossing (discrete re-anchoring) is not specified by the theory. The Stalnaker-Cooch-Schoenbaum 2015 critique cautions against over-attributing function to OFC. The mapping to V_s holds at the level of computational role but the implementation details (graded vs threshold; per-anchor vs broadcast; integration timescale) require V3 experiments.
mapping.source_context: Theoretical review with simulation, anchored in macaque and rodent OFC lesion / electrophysiology data on reversal learning, extinction, and devaluation.

confidence_components.notes: Neuron review by leading lab (Niv-Schoenbaum). Mapping fidelity high because the cognitive-map-of-task-space construct is essentially V_s under another name. Transfer low because OFC function is well conserved.
